answer:
\boxed{\text{Thimble Shoal}}

The **Thimble Shoal** is a small, uninhabited peninsula in **Hong Kong**, and the **Parallel Thimble Shoal Tunnel** (also called the **Thimble Shoal Tunnel**) is part of the **Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macau Bridge (HZMB) project**, which connects the peninsula to the mainland via artificial islands and tunnels. The tunnel is a key component of the bridge’s land link to Hong Kong’s **Lantau Island**.
